full_text:
Experimental Plan

Experiment: Dissociation protocol optimization S473_pOme

Objective: Optimize the dissociation protocol to isolate more fibroblasts from ovarian tumors.

Approaches:

1. *Using trypsin and collagenase & hyaluronidase*:

Condition 1: 30 min 0.125 % trypsin and 1 hour C&H

Condition 3: 30 min 0.125 % trypsin, 1 hour C&H, followed by brief (15 sec) 0.125% trypsin of the cell pellet

2. *Using dispase followed by collagenase & hyaluronidase*:

Condition 6: Dispase for 30 min, followed by C&H for 1 hour

Experimental Steps:

1. *Sample Preparation*:

Collected ovarian tumor samples and washed the larger tumor pieces by placing them into a 50 ml Falcon tube, pouring sterile HBSS on top, and gently inverting the tube several times.

The tumor piece was cut in three adjacent parts

Two pieces were added into a 50 ml Falcon tube containing 20 mL of 0.125 % trypsin in PBS for conditions 1 and 3.

The remaining piece was minced into small pieces using a sterile scalpel and scissors, and then transferred into a 50 mL Falcon tube for condition 6.

2. *Dissociation Protocols*:

*Collagenase & hyaluronidase-only conditions*:

For condition 1&3, treated with 0.125 % trypsin for 30 min in +37°C water bath.

0.125 % trypsin solution: 10 ml DPBS (without MgCl2 and CaCl2) + 10 ml 0.25% trypsin EDTA

Gently inverted the tubes a few times every 10 min and at the end of the incubation period.

After incubation, took the tissue pieces out and placed them into a cell culture dishes for mincing.

To the cell suspension, added 20 ml DMEM/F12+++ media, centrifuged 1000 rpm 10 min +4C, did RBC lysis (2 ml of lysis buffer, 5 min incuction and diluted with 8 ml of media) and resuspended in 1 ml media.

Minced the sliced tissue pieces into tiny pieces, and divided the contents into two 50 ml Falcon tubes (condition 1 and condition 3).

Treated samples with C&H for 1 hour at +37°C rotating. Vortexed after the incubation period.

C&H dissociation media per condition: 4.45 ml DMEM/F12+++ media + 500 µl C&H (10x stock) + 50 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filtered the samples with a 70 µm cell strainer to obtain single-cell suspensions

Pre-wetted the filter with 1 ml DMEM/F12+++, transferred the digested suspension through the strainer into a 50 ml Falcon tube, washed the stainer with 5 ml media, and discarded the leftover tissue pieces. Centrifuged the cell suspension 10 min 1000 rpm at +4°C.

Red blood cell lysis:

3 ml RBC lysis buffer, incubated 5 min at RT, 12 ml DMEM/F12+++ on top and centrifuged 10 min 1000 rpm at +4°C.

For condition 3, added 0.125% trypsin and incubate for 15 seconds.

trypsin media: 1 ml PBS + 1 ml trypsin (0.25 % stock)

After that, diluted the trypsin with 13 ml fof resh DMEM/F12+++ media and centrifuged 10 min 1000 rpm at +4°C.

Finally, resuspended the pellets (condition 1 and 3) in 2 ml DMEM/F12+++, and aliquoted a 1:10 dilution for counting. Only trypsin treated pellet was resuspended in 1 ml and not diluted.

*Dispase followed by collagenase conditions*

Treated sample 6 with dispase for 30 minutes at +37°C rotating. Vortexed approx. 15 times before and after the incubation period.

dispase dissociation media: 9.7 ml DMEM/F12+++ + 200 µl dispase 50 (U/ml stock) + 100 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filtered the samples with 70 µm cell strainer to obtain single-cell suspensions

Pre-wetted the filter with 1 ml DMEM/F12+++, transferred the digested suspension through the strainer into a 50 ml Falcon tube, and washed the stainer with 5 ml media.

Kept the leftover tissue pieces for C&H treatment.

To the cell suspension (dispase only), added 20 ml DMEM/F12+++ media, centrifuged 1000 rpm 10 min +4C, did RBC lysis (5 ml of lysis buffer, 5 min incuction and diluted with 15 ml of media) and resuspended in 2 ml media.

Leftover tissue pieces were placed in a new 50 ml Falcon tube for C&H dissociation.

Further dissociated the leftover tissue with C&H for 1 hour. Vortexed approx. 15 times before and after the incubation period.

C&H dissociation media per condition: 4.45 ml DMEM/F12+++ media + 500 µl C&H (10x stock) + 50 µl DNAse (RNAse free)

Filtered the samples with 70 µ cell stainer to obtain single-cell suspensions.

Pre-wetted the filter with 1 ml DMEM/F12+++, transferred the digested suspension through the strainer into a 50 ml Falcon tube, and washed the stainer with 5 ml media.

Red blood cell lysis:

5 ml RBC lysis buffer, incubated 5 min at RT, 10 ml DMEM/F12+++ on top and centrifuged 10 min 1000 rpm at +4°C.

Resuspended the pellet (condition 6) in 2 ml DMEM/F12+++, and aliquoted a 1:10 dilution for counting. Only dispase treated pellet was resuspended in 2 ml and not diluted.

Cell counts:

Only trypsin dissociation / mesothelial cells

cell count 1)

total: 1.22 E6 cells/ml

live: 0.222 E6 cells/ml

viability: 18.1 %

size: 8.7 µm

cell count 2)

total: 1.07 E6 cells/ml

live: 0.201 E6 cells/ml

viability: 18.3 %

size: 8.1 µm

on average 1.145 E6 cells/ml, 18.2 % viability

total cell count 1.145 E6 cells in 1 ml cell suspension

Only dispase dissociation

cell count 1)

total: 4.85 E6 cells/ml

live: 0.739 E6 cells/ml

viability: 15.3 %

size: 7.2 µm

cell count 2)

total: 4.28 cells/ml

live: 1.44 E6 cells/ml

viability: 33.7 %

size: 7.2 µm

on average 4.565 E6 cells/ml, 24.5 % viability

total cel count 9.13 E6 cells in 2 ml cell suspension

condition 1 (trypsin + C&H)

cell count 1)

total: 1.73 E6 cells/ml

live: 3.98 E6 cells/ml

viability: 23.0 %

size: 9.9 µm

cell count 2)

total: 1.48 cells/ml

live: 0.632 E6 cells/ml

viability: 42.8 %

size: 9.5 µm

on average 1.695 E6 cells/ml, 32.9 % viability

in total 1.695 E6 cells/ml x 10 = 16.95 E6 cells/ml in 2 ml cell suspension

condition 3 (trypsin + C&H + trypsin = triple dissociation)

cell count 1)

total: 1.93 E6 cells/ml

live: 0.255 E6 cells/ml

viability: 13.2 %

size: 9.0 µm

cell count 2)

total: 1.74 E6 cells/ml

live: 0.181 E6 cells/ml

viability: 10.4 %

size: 8.4 µm

on average 1.835 E6 cells/ml, 11.8 % viability

in total 1.835 E6 cells/ml x 10 = 18.35 E6 cells/ml in 2 ml cell suspension

condition 6 (dispase + C&H)

cell count 1)

total: 1.40 E6 cells/ml

live: 0.238 E6 cells/ml

viability: 17.1 %

size: 8.5 µm

cell count 2)

total: 1.10 E6 cells/ml

live: 0.168 E6 cells/ml

viability: 15.3 %

size: 7.3 µm

on average 1.25 E6 cells/ml, 16.2 % viability

in total 1.25 E6 cells/ml x 10 = 12.5 E6 cells/ml in 2 ml cell suspension

Made approx. 1.5 E6 cell aliquots for flow cytometry (calculated 1.5 [cells] / cell count [cells/ml]). When aliquoting from condition 6 (dispase and C&H), I made a calculation mistake and only aliquoted 150 000 cells per tube.

3. *Flow Cytometry*:

Stained with the whole FC panel.

Samples:

Only trypsin dissociation / mesothelial cells

Only dispase dissociation

Condition 1 (trypsin + C&H)

Condition 3 (trypsin + C&H + trypsin = triple dissociation)

Condition 6 (dispase + C&H)

Unstained sample

FMO samples

DCM FMO

CD45 FMO

EpCAM (CD326) FMO

a-SMA FMO

CD29 FMO

CD31 FMO

PDGFR-β FMO

FAP FMO

FMO samples and unstained sample were aliquoted from the condition 6 cell suspension

Washed cells once with 900 µl FACS buffer (centrifuge 6min 400 g at +4°C).

For multicolor samples, diluted the antibodies in Brilliant stain buffer (#563794 BD Horizon), added 50 µl of the antibody mix to cells, and incubated 30 min at +4°C and an additional 10 min at RT shielded from light.

For FMO samples, added the needed amount Brilliant Stain buffer (see table above) to the cells and then added antibodies one by one. Incubated 30 min at +4°C and an additional 10 min at RT shielded from light.

After incubation, washed once with 900 µl FACS buffer.

Added 200 µl IC Fixation buffer (#00-8222 Invitrogen) to fix the cells and incubated for 40 min at +4°C shielded from light.

After incubation, 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer, and incubated 5 min at +4°C.

Centrifuged, washed the pellet with 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer, and resuspended in 900 µl FACS buffer for overnight storage.

Next day, centrifuged, diluted intracellular antibody in Permeabilization buffer, and resuspended pellet into 50 µl antibody mix. Incubate 30 min at +4°C and an additional 10 min at RT shielded from light.

Washed once with 1 ml 1x Permeabilization buffer and resuspended in 400 µl FACS buffer.

Pipeted the cell suspension through 5 ml Falcon polystyrene tube with a cell-strainer cap (blue).

Preparation of compensation controls

Used for the first time BD CompBeads Plus (7.5 µm) compensation beads.

Added one drop of both positive (BD CompBeads AntiMouse IgG, #51-9006274) and negative (CompBeads Negative Control #51-9006227) compensation beads to 5ml Falcon polystyrene round bottom tubes (white cap).

For stained compensation controls, added 2 µl of each antibody

the same antibodies as in FC panel except CD16-BV510 instead of BV510-DCM.

Prepared also additional compensation controls for CD45 and CD31 with 1 µl of the antibody (instead of 2 µl), but ended up not recording those compensation controls.

Incubated approx. 1 hour min at +4°C shielded from light and resuspended to 350 µl FACS buffer.

Analyze the samples to determine the percentage of live FAP+ fibroblasts (CD45- EpCAM- CD31-, FAP+ cells).
